scope: adjacent consistency checks only where needed
review_focus: latest research state only; omit trial-and-error/version history
stop_condition: repeat until no MAJOR+ findings remain or round exceeds 20
merge_policy: do not merge to main without explicit user instruction; if requested, use no-ff and continue in this worktree afterward
solid_x: paper/docs scope at start; no solver code edits and no tested implementation deletion
